## Generated Files

| Filename | Format | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| {PROJECT_ID}_Full_Report.md | Markdown | Consolidated report with all artifacts |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Intake_Summary.md | Markdown | Intake summary |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Sprint_Brief.md | Markdown | Sprint brief(s) |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Review_Memo.md | Markdown | Review memo(s) |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Backlog.md | Markdown | Revision backlog |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Amendment_Summary.md | Markdown | Amendment summary |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Sprint_Review.md | Markdown | Sprint review(s) |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Retrospective.md | Markdown | Retrospective(s) |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Human_Finalization.md | Markdown | Human finalization note |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Process_Log.md | Markdown | Process log |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Report.docx | DOCX | Word document (if requested) |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Report.tex | LaTeX | LaTeX source (if requested) |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Report.pdf | PDF | PDF document (if requested) |
| {PROJECT_ID}_Report.html | HTML | HTML document (if requested) |

## Usage Instructions

### To continue work on this project:

1. Open a new session
2. Provide the Process Log file path
3. Say: "Continue PaperSprint from process log: {PROJECT_ID}_Process_Log.md"

### To submit the manuscript:

1. Review Human Finalization Note
2. Complete all mandatory author actions
3. Make final submission decision
